examples.title: Test Planning Process
examples.description: Algorithm for creating a test plan
examples.code:
TEST PLANNING PROCESS
BEGIN
1. ANALYZE REQUIREMENTS
 - Review software requirements
 - Identify testable features
 - Define test objectives

2. DEFINE TEST STRATEGY
 - Select testing types (functional, non-functional)
 - Determine testing levels
 - Choose testing techniques

3. DETERMINE RESOURCES
 - Identify human resources
 - Select test tools
 - Setup test environment

4. SCHEDULE ACTIVITIES
 - Create timeline
 - Define milestones
 - Assign responsibilities

5. DEFINE CRITERIA
 - Set Entry Criteria
 - Set Exit Criteria

6. RISK ASSESSMENT
 - Identify risks
 - Plan mitigation strategies

7. DOCUMENT TEST PLAN
 - Compile all information
 - Get approval
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode outlines the step-by-step process of creating a comprehensive test plan for software testing projects.

examples.title: Boundary Value Analysis Test Case Generation
examples.description: Algorithm to generate test cases using BVA technique
examples.explanation: This algorithm generates test values at and around boundary limits to catch boundary-related defects.

examples.title: Equivalence Partitioning
examples.explanation: This algorithm creates equivalence partitions to reduce test cases while maintaining coverage.
